response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable polyglot engineer with genuine breadth across web, distributed systems, and open-source tooling, but the resume shows no meaningful alignment with the core competencies this Principal-level role demands. There is no evidence of experimentation platform design, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, telemetry pipelines, statistical analysis for experiments, or growth measurement systems. The highest seniority reached is Staff, not Principal/IC6, and there is no demonstrated cross-org platform ownership. The high-throughput distributed systems work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic is the closest relevant signal but is six-plus years old and unrelated to the experimentation or growth domain.
strengths: Demonstrated high-throughput distributed systems experience handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic, showing familiarity with low-latency, scalable infrastructure
Polyglot engineer proficient in JavaScript/TypeScript, C, C++, C#, Java, and DLang, satisfying the language breadth requirement
Consistent track record of community engagement through workshops, conference talks, and open-source projects indicating mentorship instinct and knowledge-sharing ability
concerns: Zero demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, rollout automation, or growth measurement infrastructure — the explicit core of this role
Career trajectory peaks at Staff/Senior, not Principal/IC6; no evidence of cross-team architectural ownership, org-wide platform leadership, or the scale of influence expected at this seniority
Active caregiving career gap since October 2025 and most recent distributed systems work is six-plus years old, raising concerns about currency in the target domain

key_factors.factor: No experimentation or growth platform experience
